$comment: App / gateway level composition config. PRECEDENCE LIVES HERE, not in the catalogs. A catalog declares its identity + what it overrides; the APP decides which packs are installed and who wins on a collision. Higher precedence wins; here the chat pack overrides core for the conversational experience.
$comment_capabilities: What the CLIENT declares about itself in each /agent request, so the agent only emits components this client can actually render.
